name: Lizhen (Emma) Ju
description: Emma Ju, the leader of EJE (Emma Ju Estates) and the Sales Director for ACRE NY/ACRE NJ, is licensed in both New Jersey and New York and is known for her patient, professional, and results-oriented approach. Her deep understanding of architecture and design excels in both Manhattan luxury condominiums and New Jersey new construction. A skilled negotiator in high-pressure environments, Emma consistently secures the best outcomes for her clients.
description_zh: Emma Ju 是 EJE (Emma Ju Estates) 的负责人，同时也是 ACRE NY/ACRE NJ 的销售总监。她拥有新泽西州和纽约州的双重执照，以耐心、专业和以结果为导向的服务风格而闻名。她对建筑和设计有深入的了解，在曼哈顿豪华公寓和新泽西新建住宅的交易方面均有卓越表现。作为高压环境下的谈判专家，Emma 始终能为客户争取到最佳利益。
label: Team Leader

name: Jeffrey Sebastian
description: Jeffrey, a native New Yorker, fluent in english and spanish, entered the real estate industry in 2003, on Manhattan's Upper East Side during a time of significant change in the Market.With a background in construction he offers a wealth of experience and deep understanding of both the real estate and construction sector.
description_zh: Jeffrey 是纽约本地人，精通英语和西班牙语。他于 2003 年进入房地产行业，当时正值曼哈顿上东区市场发生重大变化的时期。凭借建筑背景，他在房地产和建筑领域都拥有丰富的经验和深刻的理解。
label: Licensed Real Estate Salesperson

name: Xinyan (Rita) Liu
description: Rita Liu is a Bergen County realtor fluent in English and Chinese, helping clients buy, sell, and rent across New Jersey. Known for strong negotiation and a personalized, stress-free process, she pairs local insight on schools, commutes, and community with clear guidance—helping clients find not just a house, but a home.
description_zh: Rita Liu 是一位精通中英双语的 Bergen 郡房地产经纪人，致力于帮助客户在新泽西各地购买、出售和租赁房屋。她以出色的谈判能力和个性化、无压力的服务流程而闻名，将对学区、通勤和社区的当地洞察与清晰的指导相结合——帮助客户找到的不仅是一栋房子，更是一个家。
label: Licensed Real Estate Salesperson

name: Xiaojun (Jenny) Zhang
description: Originally from China, she came to the United States as an international student at Columbia University, where she later developed her career and raised a family. Eventually, she invested in a property and put down roots in Bergen County, where her family has lived for nearly 30 years. She has a deep understanding of the local market and the unique characteristics of these communities, as well as a personal understanding of the choices and concerns that immigrants face when starting a new life here.
description_zh: 她来自中国，最初作为哥伦比亚大学的留学生来到美国，并在那里发展事业和组建家庭。最终，她在 Bergen 郡投资了房产并扎根于此，她的家人已经在那里生活了近 30 年。她对当地市场和这些社区的独特特征有深入的了解，并且对新移民在这里开始新生活时所面临的选择和担忧有切身的体会。
label: Licensed Real Estate Salesperson

name: Jingyuan (Jeremy) Yang
description:
Jeremy Yang is a dedicated real estate professional, devoted husband, and father of three young boys who is proudly building his family life in New Jersey. He currently serves as a Vice President at a Fortune 500 company, where he oversees construction and commercial business operations across the United States.
Since moving to the United States in 2016, Jeremy has lived and worked in New Jersey, gaining a deep understanding of the local communities and lifestyle that truly makes him a “local Jersey guy.” With more than 15 years of experience in engineering and construction, he brings valuable technical insight and practical knowledge to the New Jersey real estate market.
As a member of the Emma Team, Jeremy understands that buying a home is one of the most important decisions in life. He is committed to providing expert guidance and support throughout the home-buying process, helping clients find the home that best fits their needs and dreams. Known for his approachable and supportive nature, Jeremy strives to be more than just an agent—he aims to be a trusted advisor and a friend his clients can rely on every step of the way.
description_zh:
Jeremy Yang 是一位敬业的房地产专业人士、顾家的丈夫和三个男孩的父亲，他很自豪能在新泽西建立自己的家庭生活。他目前在一家财富 500 强公司担任副总裁，负责监督全美的建筑和商业运营。
自 2016 年移居美国以来，Jeremy 一直在新泽西生活和工作，对当地社区和生活方式有深入的了解，这使他成为一个真正的“新泽西本地人”。凭借 15 年以上的工程和建筑经验，他为新泽西房地产市场带来了宝贵的技术见解和实用知识。
作为 Emma 团队的一员，Jeremy 深知买房是人生最重要的决定之一。他致力于在整个购房过程中提供专业的指导和支持，帮助客户找到最符合他们需求和梦想的家。Jeremy 凭借其平易近人和乐于助人的性格，努力做到不仅仅是一名经纪人——他更希望成为客户在每一步都可以信赖的顾问和朋友。
label: Licensed Real Estate Salesperson
